note: full-time amnesiac-stigmergic; hollow state, not hidden state. everything starts here and is lifted to Foam when another mind's vocabulary needs it.

vocabulary.reading: after resting, the rest of the walk is exactly what it would have been
undo in an append-only world: position home, record grown, degrees of freedom commensurate
locate yourself; locate the recognized; the comparison is a seat; recognition widens yours
a fresh edge rides no old path; depositing it creates the reach
contact adds a dimension; reification fixes one
counting X is free exactly where X's identification is licensed; dissonance is the remainder pressing on an attempted quotient
an experience of world in which the world experiences itself as being well
